tuning: E A D G B E

[Intro]
[ch]B[/ch] [ch]F#/A#[/ch] [ch]D#m7[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch] [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]B7[/ch] [ch]Emaj7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]              [ch]D#m7[/ch] [ch]G#m7[/ch]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]            [ch]B7[/ch]     [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
 Baby it's no mystery , you're bringing out the best in me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]                [ch]G#m7[/ch]
And though I've been in love before[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
 I've never had the kind of love that made me feel secure[/tab]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]                     [ch]D#m7[/ch]     [ch]G#m7[/ch] [ch]G+[/ch]
 I never thought that give and take[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]       [ch]F+[/ch]       [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Mentality was right for me, hmm[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]         [ch]G#m7[/ch]        [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]
You made me open up and see , that it's for real[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]
And there's no other place I'd rather be[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]B[/ch]                              [ch]F#/A#[/ch]
I think about you all the time 24-7 babe[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G#m7[/ch]                            [ch]F#m7[/ch]          [ch]B7[/ch]
The love I have inside for you , is more than any words can say[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]                               [ch]D#m7[/ch]        [ch]G#m7[/ch]
Thanking God on bended knee , we'll always be together babe[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
You and me yeah[/tab]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]                          [ch]F#/A#[/ch]        [ch]D#m7[/ch]

Thanking God on bended knee , we'll always be together babe[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]B[/ch]               [ch]D#m7[/ch]    [ch]G#m7[/ch]
 When I'm in my nine to five[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]                 [ch]B7[/ch]        [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
I smile went across my lips when I[/tab]

Daydream about the night before[/tab]

 I count the minutes till I'm in your arms once more[/tab]

 My friends they don't understand, no[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#m7[/ch]          [ch]F+[/ch]        [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
In me they see a brand new man[/tab]

I give you props and tell them that , my shorty's bout it[/tab]
